creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
I added patches, that fix hellanzb with twisted >=10 from here:
https://launchpadlibrarian.net/42185137/twisted-10.0.0.patch
and splitted it to three.

While here also change some things in the port's Makefile:
- add license (BSD)
- use USE_TWISTED_RUN instead of directly depending on twisted
- restricted python version to 2.x branch - it will not work with 3.x
- some cosmetics

I'm now waiting for maintainer's response and will commit this at next 
Monday if he will not.

-- 
Regards,
Ruslan

Tinderboxing kills... the drives.
